title: TNAU rice NPK blanket rates by duration — for cross-checking Sri Lanka dry-zone programs
body: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University's NPK blanket rates for transplanted puddled lowland rice, in kg/ha of N / P₂O₅ / K₂O: short-duration dry-season (150 / 50 / 50 for Cauvery Delta; 120 / 40 / 40 for other tracts), medium-long-duration wet-season (150 / 50 / 50), hybrid rice (175 / 60 / 60), and low-N-responsive Improved White Ponni (75 / 50 / 50, with N split three ways instead of four). N and K are split in four equal applications across basal, active tillering, panicle initiation, and heading. Converting to Sri Lankan fertilizer inventory — 150 kg N/ha ≈ 325 kg urea, 50 kg P₂O₅/ha ≈ 110 kg TSP, 50 kg K₂O/ha ≈ 85 kg MOP — which is meaningfully heavier than RRDI's published Sri Lankan schedules for similar durations. The rates can inform dry-zone tank cultivations where soils are similar to Cauvery Delta alluviums, but apply the Sri Lankan rate as a floor + soil-test-adjust upward rather than copying TNAU's ceiling. The split-application rhythm (four splits for N+K, not a single basal + one top-dress) is the most transferable practice.

body_translated.en: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University's NPK blanket rates for transplanted puddled lowland rice, in kg/ha of N / P₂O₅ / K₂O: short-duration dry-season (150 / 50 / 50 for Cauvery Delta; 120 / 40 / 40 for other tracts), medium-long-duration wet-season (150 / 50 / 50), hybrid rice (175 / 60 / 60), and low-N-responsive Improved White Ponni (75 / 50 / 50, with N split three ways instead of four). N and K are split in four equal applications across basal, active tillering, panicle initiation, and heading. Converting to Sri Lankan fertilizer inventory — 150 kg N/ha ≈ 325 kg urea, 50 kg P₂O₅/ha ≈ 110 kg TSP, 50 kg K₂O/ha ≈ 85 kg MOP — which is meaningfully heavier than RRDI's published Sri Lankan schedules for similar durations. The rates can inform dry-zone tank cultivations where soils are similar to Cauvery Delta alluviums, but apply the Sri Lankan rate as a floor + soil-test-adjust upward rather than copying TNAU's ceiling. The split-application rhythm (four splits for N+K, not a single basal + one top-dress) is the most transferable practice.
body_translated.si: ටැන්ක් කෙත්වත්තේ බද්ධ කළ පහත් බිම් වී සඳහා තමිල් නාඩු කෘෂිකාර්මික විශ්වවිද්‍යාලයේ NPK පොදු අනුපාත, N / P₂O₅ / K₂O kg/ha වලින්: කෙටි-කාල වියළි වාරය (Cauvery Delta සඳහා 150 / 50 / 50; අනෙකුත් පෙදෙස් සඳහා 120 / 40 / 40), මධ්‍ය-දිගු-කාල තෙත් වාරය (150 / 50 / 50), හයිබ්‍රිඩ් වී (175 / 60 / 60), සහ අඩු-N ප්‍රතිචාරයක් ඇති Improved White Ponni (75 / 50 / 50, N හතරට නොව තුනට බෙදයි). N සහ K මූලික, ක්‍රියාකාරී tillering, panicle ආරම්භය සහ heading අතර සමාන කොටස් හතරකට බෙදා යොදනු ලැබේ. ශ්‍රී ලාංකික පොහොර ගබඩාවට පරිවර්තනය — 150 kg N/ha ≈ 325 kg urea, 50 kg P₂O₅/ha ≈ 110 kg TSP, 50 kg K₂O/ha ≈ 85 kg MOP — එනම් සමාන කාල සීමා සඳහා RRDI ප්‍රකාශිත ශ්‍රී ලාංකික කාල සටහන්වලට වඩා සැලකිය යුතු ලෙස බරයි. පස Cauvery Delta alluvium සමග සමාන වියළි කලාප ටැංකි වගාවන්ට මෙම අනුපාත දැනුම් දිය හැකි නමුත්, TNAU හි උපරිම අනුපාතය පිටපත් කිරීම වෙනුවට ශ්‍රී ලාංකික අනුපාතය බිම ලෙස + පස පරීක්ෂණය කර ඉහළට ගැලපන්න. බෙදූ-යෙදුම් රිද්මය (N+K සඳහා බෙදීම් හතරක්, තනි මූලික + එක මතුපිට යෙදුම නොව) වඩාත්ම මාරු කළ හැකි පිළිවෙතයි.
body_translated.ta: நாற்று நட்டு சேற்றில் செய்யப்பட்ட பள்ளநில நெல்லுக்கான தமிழ்நாடு வேளாண்மை பல்கலைக்கழகத்தின் NPK பொத்தான விகிதங்கள், N / P₂O₅ / K₂O kg/ha-இல்: குறுகிய-கால வறண்ட-பருவம் (காவேரி டெல்டாவுக்கு 150 / 50 / 50; பிற பகுதிகளுக்கு 120 / 40 / 40), நடுத்தர-நீண்ட-கால ஈர-பருவம் (150 / 50 / 50), ஹைப்ரிட் நெல் (175 / 60 / 60), மற்றும் குறைந்த-N பதிலளிக்கும் Improved White Ponni (75 / 50 / 50, N நான்காக அல்ல மூன்றாகப் பிரித்து). N மற்றும் K அடிப்படை, செயலில் tillering, panicle தொடக்கம், மற்றும் heading ஆகியவற்றில் நான்கு சம பயன்பாடுகளாக பிரிக்கப்படுகின்றன. இலங்கை உர சரக்குக்கு மாற்றம் — 150 kg N/ha ≈ 325 kg urea, 50 kg P₂O₅/ha ≈ 110 kg TSP, 50 kg K₂O/ha ≈ 85 kg MOP — இது ஒரே கால அளவுகளுக்கான RRDI வெளியிட்ட இலங்கை அட்டவணைகளை விட அர்த்தமுள்ள அளவில் அதிகமாகும். காவேரி டெல்டா வண்டல் போன்ற மண் கொண்ட வறண்ட வலய ஏரி சாகுபடிக்கு இந்த விகிதங்கள் தகவல் வழங்க முடியும், ஆனால் TNAU-வின் உச்சரிப்பை நகலெடுப்பதற்குப் பதிலாக இலங்கை விகிதத்தை தரையாகப் பயன்படுத்தி + மண்-சோதனை செய்து மேல்நோக்கி சரிசெய்யவும். பிரித்த-பயன்பாட்டு தாளம் (N+K-க்கு நான்கு பிரிவுகள், ஒற்றை அடிப்படை + ஒரு மேல்-ஏற்றம் அல்ல) மிகவும் மாற்றக்கூடிய நடைமுறை.

quote: Short duration (dry season) - Cauvery delta & Coimbatore: N 150, P2O5 50, K2O 50. Short duration (dry season) - Other tracts: 120 / 40 / 40. Medium/long duration (wet season): 150 / 50 / 50. Hybrid rice: 175 / 60 / 60. Apply N and K in four equal splits viz., basal, tillering, panicle initiation and heading stages.

field_provenance.caveat: Tamil Nadu recommendation. The split-application rhythm is agronomically transferable; the rates must be validated by an RRDI agronomist on Sri Lanka tank-fed alluvium soils before being used for farmer-facing advice.
